name: Claude Memory Doctor
description: Audit and fix Claude Code configuration files — CLAUDE.md, rules, hooks, settings, plugins, and memory.
longDescription:
Runs a **6-phase diagnostic** on your Claude Code setup: discover all config files, cross-file analysis, per-file quality scoring, report generation, interactive triage, and automated fixes.

- **Cross-file analysis** (7 categories): contradictions, redundancy, infrastructure issues, anti-patterns, over-specification, staleness, bloat
- **Quality scoring**: CLAUDE.md (100-point rubric across 6 criteria) and `.claude/rules/` files (100-point rubric across 5 criteria), with letter grades A–F
- **Scope options**: project-level (default), `--home` for user-level, `--all` for both
- **Reference files**: 13 anti-patterns catalog, quality rubrics for CLAUDE.md and rules, starter templates for 7 project types

Generates a structured report with `file:line` references and exact fix instructions, then offers Fix All, Critical Only, Review Each, or Report Only.
